name: current-2024-2026-high-score-tail
description: Broad 2024-2026 test of championship-scoped event score-scale corrections against the current residual-ridge default.
modelNames: No-Future Scaled-Archetype Ensemble K=1.10 W=0.20 P=0.00 S=0.15 M=8 CR=0.100 DR=0.050

notes: The broad replay checks whether the targeted championship tail correction generalizes across multiple seasons rather than only helping 2026.
All scale corrections are no-future because the event mean is computed only from previous alliance scores in that same event.
